subject: How is the Q1 summary report coming along?
body: I need this report by Monday next week. Please give me a progress update ASAP. -- Director Wang

subject: When can the customization proposal be delivered?
body: Hello, the customization proposal we discussed at our last meeting was originally due on March 20, but we still haven't received it. Please confirm the delivery date as soon as possible. -- Zhang Ming, Dingxin Software

subject: Performance evaluation form not yet submitted
body: Please note that the deadline for this quarter's performance evaluation form is March 25, and yours has not been submitted yet. Please complete it as soon as possible. -- Li Wei, HR Department

subject: Sharing a great article
body: I recommend you check out this article about AI trends, very interesting.

subject: System maintenance notice
body: System maintenance this Sunday from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM.
